item.title: [PDF] how to send bitcoin on cash app{Call Speak}
item.description: To send Bitcoin using Cash App, open the app, go to the Call. 1-(877)(774)(9396) Bitcoin tab, select “Send,” enter the recipient's wallet address, and confirm.
